summary: Tested Equipment Manager search feature. All 9 test cases passed: search bar prominently displayed at top, correct placeholder text, keyboard shortcut hint visible, search returns matching items, match count badge shows correct count, matching items highlighted with yellow background and 'Match' badge, hierarchy auto-expands to show matching items, clear button restores original state, toolbar buttons remain visible below search.

search_bar_prominent.notes: Search bar is prominently displayed at top of Equipment Manager page with gradient background (from-slate-50 to-blue-50), larger input (h-12), and blue search icon

placeholder_text.notes: Placeholder shows 'Search name, description, tag...' as expected

keyboard_shortcut_hint.notes: 'Press / to search' hint is visible on the right side of search input

search_returns_matches.notes: Searching for 'Tyromer' returns 1 match, searching for 'Netherlands' returns 1 match. Search works on name field.

match_count_badge.notes: Match count badge shows '1 match found' or '0 matches found' with blue background (bg-blue-100). Also shows 'Matching items are highlighted in yellow' helper text.

yellow_highlighting.notes: Matching items have yellow background (bg-yellow-50) and 'Match' badge (bg-yellow-200 text-yellow-800)

auto_expand_hierarchy.notes: When searching for nested item 'Netherlands', parent 'Tyromer' auto-expands to show the matching child. Initial state: 1 visible node, after search: 2 visible nodes (parent + matching child)

clear_button.notes: Clear button (X) appears when search has text, clicking it clears search and restores original expanded state. Escape key also clears search.

toolbar_buttons_visible.notes: Import List, Export Excel, and Add Installation buttons remain visible below search bar

keyboard_shortcut_slash.notes: '/' key focuses search input when not in another input field

escape_key_clears.notes: Escape key clears search text and unfocuses input

no_results_handling.notes: Searching for non-existent term shows '0 matches found'

critical_code_review_comments: Search implementation is well-structured with proper state management for pre-search expanded IDs
Keyboard shortcuts (/ and Escape) are properly implemented with event listeners
Auto-expand logic correctly finds parent chain and expands all ancestors of matching nodes
Yellow highlighting uses appropriate Tailwind classes for visibility
seed_data_creation: None - used existing hierarchy data (Tyromer installation with The Netherlands - Arnhem child)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Equipment Manager search feature fully tested and working. Search bar at top with keyboard shortcuts (/ to focus, Escape to clear), auto-expand for nested matches, yellow highlighting with Match badge, match count display. All features verified working.
